data.body: ROOT CAUSE of repeated Verified -1: my base 2d1524ad8 had a pre-existing lean-core bug (unguarded pydantic_ai import in llm/failure.py). While in review, origin/main advanced +5 including 343c8dd2a (optionality now GATES Verified) + 57dde4b16 (FIXES failure.py lazy imports). My branch was behind the fix. FIX: rebased all 5 commits onto origin/main@46c1794af (clean, no conflicts, Change-Ids kept). Verified locally: attest suite 114 pass, lint+typecheck OK, and the previously-failing lean-core degradation test now GREEN (19 passed) on a clean-core wheel from the rebased tree. Re-pushing rebased stack (FF-only ADR-0040 requires current-tip anyway; rebase drops Verified, carries LLM-Review per ADR-0041).
